attributes.action: make funding for schools in wales more equal, and ensure all schools have enough
attributes.background: i want the government to make funding for schools based on the area, and what they already have. this does not include taking away from schools with satisfactory facilities, but being more specific and thorough  in how the funding is distributed to ensure that all schools get by sufficiently.

rejection.details:
This is a matter devolved to Wales.

You may wish to start a petition on the Senedd petitions site:

https://petitions.senedd.wales/
